t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Human-readable name shown in UI (e.g., "Apple", "EUR/USD"). Used in position displays, order forms, and APIs. (Tier 1 — Trade.InstrumentMetaData)

t1_fidelity_table.loss: Core description verbatim from Dim_Instrument wiki. Added 'Passthrough from Dim_Instrument' lineage suffix. No semantic loss.

issues.problem: Tagged Tier 2 (BI_DB_PositionPnL) but is a direct passthrough from BI_DB_PositionPnL which has a wiki documenting DateID. Should be Tier 1 with verbatim description from BI_DB_PositionPnL.

Tagged Tier 5 (Expert Review) but is a passthrough from BI_DB_PositionPnL which has a wiki documenting IsSettled as '1 = real asset, 0 = CFD asset. Rewound via PositionChangeLog (ChangeTypeID = 13) when applicable.' Should be Tier 1 from BI_DB_PositionPnL.
Source relay: cited (Tier 1 — Trade.PositionTbl) tracing 3 hops back through Dim_Position. Immediate upstream with wiki is BI_DB_PositionPnL. Should cite BI_DB_PositionPnL as the source.
DDL declares varchar(200) but upstream Dim_Instrument wiki shows varchar(100). The wider target column is not called out as a discrepancy.
Tier legend only lists Tiers 1, 2, and 5. Standard shape requires full tier legend with star ratings for all tiers.

verdict.regeneration_feedback: Re-run with: (1) Re-tag DateID as (Tier 1 — BI_DB_PositionPnL) using verbatim text: 'Snapshot date as YYYYMMDD; partition key.' (2) Re-tag IsSettled as (Tier 1 — BI_DB_PositionPnL) using verbatim text: '1 = real asset, 0 = CFD asset. Rewound via PositionChangeLog (ChangeTypeID = 13) when applicable.' (3) Re-tag InstrumentID source from Trade.PositionTbl to BI_DB_PositionPnL (immediate upstream). (4) Add full tier legend with star ratings. (5) Add explicit Phase Gate Checklist.
